title: Health Information Technician
description: Fortrea's Clinical Research Operations team is seeking a Health Information Technician for our Milwaukee site. You'll manage medical records, ensure regulatory compliance, and maintain the integrity of patient data that underpins critical research studies. This role is essential to our mission of advancing scientific discovery while protecting patient privacy.
responsibilities: Manage and maintain patient medical records in accordance with HIPAA and institutional standards
Enter and verify patient data into electronic health record systems with high accuracy
Abstract clinical information from source documents to support research protocols
File, retrieve, and organize medical documentation according to established systems
Assist with audit preparation and regulatory compliance documentation

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; certification in Health Information Technology preferred
skills: Proficiency with electronic health record systems
Excellent attention to detail and accuracy
Basic computer skills and data entry competency

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
Opportunity to contribute to advancing medical research
